requirement.requirement_text: Data Architecture experience is highly desirable; this could include demonstrated experience designing a new Data Pipeline or a significant redesign of an existing Data Pipeline.
Suppliers are to provide contact details for at least 2 referees for whom the Supplier has performed similar services within the past 3 years.

Supplier is to attach a Resume / CV for each proposed Key Person. At a minimum, each Resume / CV must contain specific details including the candidate’s name, role, current security clearance level, experience summary, and professional referees.
